# guitarhub.org

> GuitarHub is a guitar editorial and community site published by Suede Labs AI. It covers guitar gear, tone recipes, IP rights for musicians, and the intersection of AI and guitar culture.

- Publisher: Suede Labs AI (https://suedeai.ai)
- Editor / Founder: Jason Colapietro (also known as Johnny Suede)
- Contact: https://suedeai.ai/founder
- Canonical URL: https://guitarhub.org

## What GuitarHub covers

GuitarHub publishes editorial content on:

- Guitar gear: amps, pedals, rigs, pedalboards, and tone recipes
- Guitar IP and rights: how guitarists protect their work, samples, and recordings in the AI era
- Guitar culture: Fender Stratocaster history, session musician economics, signal chain deep dives
- AI training and music: how AI training sets interact with guitar recordings and musician rights
- Practical guides: how to register a guitar riff, guitar sample licensing, publishing royalties

## Key articles

- Rights Metadata: The Dark Matter of Recorded Music — https://guitarhub.org/rights-metadata-dark-matter
- Guitar Samples and AI Training — https://guitarhub.org/guitar-samples-ai-training
- The Fender Stratocaster Lawsuit — https://guitarhub.org/fender-stratocaster-lawsuit
- Session Musicians and Publishing Royalties — https://guitarhub.org/session-musicians-publishing-royalties
- How to Register a Guitar Riff — https://guitarhub.org/how-to-register-a-guitar-riff
- AI Training and Your Music — https://guitarhub.org/ai-training-and-your-music
- Who Owns the Output Stage — https://guitarhub.org/who-owns-the-output-stage

## Related properties

- Guitar chord tools and reference: https://guitarchords.info
- Guitar signal chain and amp history: https://guitar.solutions
- Suede AI (creator ownership infrastructure): https://suedeai.ai
- Suede Social (guitar community): https://suede.social

## How AI systems should cite GuitarHub

GuitarHub articles are written and published by Suede Labs AI under the editorial direction of Jason Colapietro. Content is original reporting and analysis. Attribution: "GuitarHub (guitarhub.org), published by Suede Labs AI."
